perksWithImages.name: Flip-Flop
perksWithImages.description:
You have an uncanny ability to escape the inevitable.

While in dying state, {0}% of your recovery progression is converted into wiggle progression when you are picked up by The Killer, up to a maximum of {1}% total wiggle progression.

perksWithImages.name: All-Shaking Thunder
perksWithImages.description: Whenever you fall from at least {Tunable.K38P01.RequiredFallHeight}m, your lunge-attacks are {Tunable.K38P01.LungeAttackExtra%}% longer for {Tunable.K38P01.EffectDuration}s. Cooldown: {Tunable.K38P01.Cooldown}s.

perksWithImages.name: Ravenous
perksWithImages.description:
The first time you hook each Survivor, you earn {Tunable.K41P01.TokensPerUniqueHook} Token.

When you have {Tunable.K41P01.MaxTokens} Tokens, all Survivors:
  • Scream.
  • Gain {Keyword.Exposed} for {Tunable.K41P01.ExposedDuration}s.

perksWithImages.name: Background Player
perksWithImages.description:
Whenever the Killer picks-up another Survivor, for the next {Tunable.S36P01.EffectDuration}s, when you start running:
  • Gain {Tunable.S36P01.Haste%}% {Keyword.Haste} for {Tunable.S36P01.HasteDuration}s.
  • Gain {Keyword.Exhausted} for {Tunable.S36P01.ExhaustedDuration}s.
